parts.text: /review Final blocker-only review after CAS hardening for markDeploymentCancelled and failed catch-path writes in workspace-deployment-runner.ts. Focus on terminal-state clobber races only.

state.title: markDeploymentCancelled|catch\s*\(|status\s*=|terminal|cancelled|failed

state.output:
<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>580:         },
581:       });
582:     }
583: 
584:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
585:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
586:       status: 'failed',
587:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
588:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
589:     });
590:     return;
591:   }
592: 
593:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
594:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
595:       env.DB,
596:       workspaceId,
597:       deploymentId,
598:       'deployment_cancelled'
599:     );
600:     if (!hasCancelledEvent) {
601:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
602:         workspaceId,
603:         deploymentId,
604:         eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
605:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
606:       });
607:     }
608: 
609:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
610:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
611:       status: 'cancelled',
612:       errorCode: null,
613:       errorMessage: null,
614:     });
615:   }
616: }
617: 
618: async function markDeploymentCancelled(
619:   env: Env,
620:   workspaceId: string,
621:   deploymentId: string,
622:   reason: string
623: ): Promise<void> {
624:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
625:   const cancelledUpdate = await env.DB
626:     .prepare(
627:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
628:        SET status = 'cancelled',
629:            result_json = ?,
630:            error_code = NULL,
631:            error_message = NULL,
632:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
633:            updated_at = ?
634:        WHERE id = ?
635:          AND workspace_id = ?
636:          AND status IN ('queued', 'running')`
637:     )
638:     .bind(JSON.stringify({ reason }), now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
639:     .run();
640: 
641:   if ((cancelledUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
642:     return;
643:   }
644: 
645:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
646:     workspaceId,
647:     deploymentId,
648:     eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
649:     payload: { reason },
650:   });
651:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
652:     deploymentId,
653:     status: 'cancelled',
654:     errorCode: null,
655:     errorMessage: null,
656:   });
657: }
658: 
659: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
660:   if (!startedAt) {
661:     return false;
662:   }
663: 
664:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
665:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
666:     return false;
667:   }
668: 
669:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
670: }
671: 
672: async function throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
673:   const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
674:   if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
675:     throw new CancelRequestedError();
676:   }
677: }
678: 
679: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
680:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
681:   if (!deployment) {
682:     return;
683:   }
684:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
685:   if (!payload) {
686:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
687:   }
688: 
689:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
690:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
691:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
692:   }
693: 
694:   const validation =
695:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
696:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
697:       : {};
698:   const autoFix =
699:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
700:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
701:       : {};
702:   const cache =
703:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
704:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
705:       : {};
706:   const requestedToolchain =
707:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
708:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
709:       : null;

(Showing lines 580-709 of 2369. Use offset=710 to continue.)
</content>

1550: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1551:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1552:   if (!claimed) {
1553:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1554:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1555:       try {
1556:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1557:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1558:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1559:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1560:         }
1561:       }
1562:       return;
1563:     }
1564: 
1565:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1566:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1567:       return;
1568:     }
1569: 
1570:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1571:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1572:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1573:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1574:           return;
1575:         }
1576:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1577:           workspaceId,
1578:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1579:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1580:         });
1581:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1582:           workspaceId,
1583:           deploymentId,
1584:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1585:           payload: {
1586:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1587:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1588:           },
1589:         });
1590:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1591:           deploymentId,
1592:           status: 'failed',
1593:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1594:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1595:         });
1596:         return;
1597:       }
1598: 
1599:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1600:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1601:           try {
1602:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1603:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1604:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1605:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1606: 
1607:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1608:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1609:               return;
1610:             }
1611: 
1612:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1613:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1614:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1615:               }
1616:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1617:               if (!deployedUrl) {
1618:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider deployment succeeded but no deployed URL is available yet; retry requested');
1619:               }
1620:               const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1621:               const existingResult =
1622:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
1623:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1624:                   : {};
1625:               const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1626:               const requestProvenance =
1627:                 requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1628:                   ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1629:                   : {};
1630:               const existingArtifact =
1631:                 existingResult.artifact && typeof existingResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.artifact)
1632:                   ? (existingResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
1633:                   : {};
1634:               const existingProvenance =
1635:                 existingResult.provenance && typeof existingResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.provenance)
1636:                   ? (existingResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1637:                   : {};
1638:               const successResult = {
1639:                 ...existingResult,
1640:                 url: deployedUrl,
1641:                 artifact: {
1642:                   sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1643:                   sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1644:                   outputBundleSha256:
1645:                     typeof existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
1646:                   outputDir: typeof existingArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputDir : null,
1647:                 },
1648:                 provenance: {
1649:                   ...existingProvenance,
1650:                   workspaceId,
1651:                   taskId:
1652:                     typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1653:                       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1654:                       : (existingProvenance.taskId ?? null),
1655:                   operationId:
1656:                     typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1657:                       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1658:                       : (existingProvenance.operationId ?? null),
1659:                   trigger:
1660:                     typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1661:                       ? requestProvenance.trigger
1662:                       : typeof existingProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1663:                         ? existingProvenance.trigger
1664:                         : 'manual',
1665:                 },
1666:                 rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
1667:                 reconciled: true,
1668:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
1669:               };
1670:               const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
1671:                 .prepare(
1672:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1673:                    SET status = 'succeeded',
1674:                        deployed_url = ?,
1675:                        provider_deployment_id = ?,
1676:                        source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
1677:                        source_bundle_key = ?,
1678:                        cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1679:                        result_json = ?,
1680:                        error_code = NULL,
1681:                        error_message = NULL,
1682:                        finished_at = ?,
1683:                        updated_at = ?
1684:                    WHERE id = ?
1685:                      AND workspace_id = ?
1686:                      AND status = 'running'
1687:                      AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
1688:                 )
1689:                 .bind(
1690:                   deployedUrl,
1691:                   existing.providerDeploymentId,
1692:                   existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1693:                   existing.sourceBundleKey,
1694:                   JSON.stringify(successResult),
1695:                   finishedAt,
1696:                   finishedAt,
1697:                   deploymentId,
1698:                   workspaceId
1699:                 )
1700:                 .run();
1701: 
1702:               if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1703:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1704:               }
1705:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1706:                 workspaceId,
1707:                 deploymentId,
1708:                 eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1709:                 payload: {
1710:                   deployedUrl,
1711:                   reconciled: true,
1712:                   fromCancelRequested: true,
1713:                 },
1714:               });
1715:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1716:                 deploymentId,
1717:                 status: 'succeeded',
1718:                 deployedUrl,
1719:                 deployedAt: finishedAt,
1720:                 errorCode: null,
1721:                 errorMessage: null,
1722:               });
1723:               return;
1724:             }
1725: 
1726:             if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1727:               const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1728:               const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1729:               const failedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1730:               const failedUpdate = await env.DB
1731:                 .prepare(
1732:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1733:                    SET status = 'failed',
1734:                        error_code = ?,
1735:                        error_message = ?,
1736:                        finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1737:                        updated_at = ?
1738:                    WHERE id = ?
1739:                      AND workspace_id = ?
1740:                      AND status = 'running'
1741:                      AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
1742:                 )
1743:                 .bind(errorCode, errorMessage, failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
1744:                 .run();
1745: 
1746:               if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1747:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment failed reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1748:               }
1749:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1750:                 workspaceId,
1751:                 deploymentId,
1752:                 eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1753:                 payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1754:               });
1755:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1756:                 deploymentId,
1757:                 status: 'failed',
1758:                 errorCode,
1759:                 errorMessage,
1760:               });
1761:               return;
1762:             }
1763:           } catch {
1764:             // Best-effort reconciliation only.
1765:           }
1766:         }
1767: 
1768:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1769:       }
1770: 
1771:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1772:     }
1773:     return;
1774:   }
1775: 
1776:   try {
1777:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1778:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1779:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1780:         workspaceId,
1781:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1782:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1783:       });
1784:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1785:         workspaceId,
1786:         deploymentId,
1787:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1788:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1789:       });
1790:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1791:         deploymentId,
1792:         status: 'failed',
1793:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1794:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1795:       });
1796:       return;
1797:     }
1798: 
1799:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1800:   } catch (error) {
1801:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1802:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1803:       try {
1804:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1805:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1806:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1807:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1808:         }
1809:       }
1810:       return;
1811:     }
1812: 
1813:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1814:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1815:       return;
1816:     }
1817: 
1818:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1819:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1820:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1821:         true
1822:       );
1823:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1824: 
1825:       const failedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1826:       const failedUpdate = await env.DB
1827:         .prepare(
1828:           `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1829:            SET status = 'failed',
1830:                error_code = ?,
1831:                error_message = ?,
1832:                result_json = ?,
1833:                finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1834:                updated_at = ?
1835:            WHERE id = ?
1836:              AND workspace_id = ?
1837:              AND status IN ('queued', 'running')`
1838:         )
1839:         .bind(
1840:           error.code,
1841:           error.message,
1842:           JSON.stringify({ rollback }),
1843:           failedAt,
1844:           failedAt,
1845:           deploymentId,
1846:           workspaceId
1847:         )
1848:         .run();
1849: 
1850:       if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1851:         return;
1852:       }
1853:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1854:         workspaceId,
1855:         deploymentId,
1856:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1857:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1858:       });
1859:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1860:         deploymentId,
1861:         status: 'failed',
1862:         errorCode: error.code,
1863:         errorMessage: error.message,
1864:       });
1865:       return;
1866:     }
1867: 
1868:     if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
1869:       throw error;
1870:     }
1871: 
1872:     if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1873:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1874:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1875:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1876:       }
1877:     }
1878: 
1879:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1880:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1881:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1882:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1883:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1884:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1885:         let cancelAcceptedByProvider = false;
1886:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1887:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1888: 
1889:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1890:           try {
1891:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1892:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1893:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1894:               workspaceId,
1895:               deploymentId,
1896:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1897:               payload: {
1898:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1899:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1900:                 retryPath: true,
1901:               },
1902:             });
1903:             if (cancel.accepted) {
1904:               cancelAcceptedByProvider = true;
1905:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1906:             } else {
1907:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1908:                 workspaceId,
1909:                 deploymentId,
1910:                 eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1911:                 payload: {
1912:                   providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1913:                   retryPath: true,
1914:                 },
1915:               });
1916:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1917:             }
1918:           } catch (providerCancelError) {
1919:             if (providerCancelError instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1920:               throw providerCancelError;
1921:             }
1922:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1923:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1924:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1925:             }
1926:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1927:           }
1928:         }
1929: 
1930:         if (cancelAcceptedByProvider) {
1931:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1932:         }
1933: 
1934:         if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1935:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested with unknown provider state; retry reconciliation');
1936:         }
1937: 
1938:         if (shouldCancelLocally) {
1939:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1940:           return;
1941:         }
1942: 
1943:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1944:       }
1945: 
1946:       const retryMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1947:       const retryUpdate = await env.DB
1948:         .prepare(
1949:           `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1950:            SET status = 'queued',
1951:                started_at = NULL,
1952:                finished_at = NULL,
1953:                error_code = 'retry_scheduled',
1954:                error_message = ?,
1955:                updated_at = ?
1956:            WHERE id = ?
1957:              AND workspace_id = ?
1958:              AND status = 'running'
1959:              AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
1960:         )
1961:         .bind(retryMessage, new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1962:         .run();
1963: 
1964:       if ((retryUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1965:         const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1966:         if (concurrent?.status === 'running' && concurrent.cancelRequestedAt) {
1967:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1968:         }
1969:         if (concurrent?.status === 'queued' && concurrent.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled') {
1970:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
1971:         }
1972:         return;
1973:       }
1974: 
1975:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1976:         workspaceId,
1977:         deploymentId,
1978:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1979:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },

1981:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');

1984:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1985:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1986:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,

1988:     );
1989:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1990: 
1991:     const failedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1992:     const failedUpdate = await env.DB
1993:       .prepare(

1997:              error_message = ?,
1998:              result_json = ?,
1999:              finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2000:              updated_at = ?
2001:          WHERE id = ?
2002:            AND workspace_id = ?
2003:            AND status IN ('queued', 'running')`
2004:       )
2005:       .bind(message, JSON.stringify({ rollback }), failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)

2008:     if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2009:       return;

2020:     });
2021:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {

2027:   }

2030: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
2031:   env: Env,
2032:   workspaceId: string,
2033:   deploymentId: string,
2034:   maxCycles = 8
2035: ): Promise<void> {
2036:   async function reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2037:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2038:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running' || !latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2039:       return false;
2040:     }
2041: 
2042:     if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
2043:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2044:         workspaceId,
2045:         deploymentId,
2046:         eventType: 'deployment_cancel_reconcile_deferred',
2047:         payload: {
2048:           inline: true,
2049:           reason: 'provider_deployment_unknown',
2050:         },
2051:       });
2052:       return false;
2053:     }
2054: 
2055:     try {
2056:       const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
2057:       const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
2058:       const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
2059:       const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(latest.providerDeploymentId);
2060: 
2061:       if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
2062:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
2063:         return true;
2064:       }
2065: 
2066:       if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
2067:         if (!latest.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !latest.sourceBundleKey) {
2068:           return false;
2069:         }
2070:         const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? latest.deployedUrl ?? null;
2071:         if (!deployedUrl) {
2072:           return false;
2073:         }
2074:         const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2075:         const latestResult =
2076:           latest.result && typeof latest.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latest.result)
2077:             ? (latest.result as Record<string, unknown>)
2078:             : {};
2079:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
2080:         const requestProvenance =
2081:           requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
2082:             ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2083:             : {};
2084:         const latestArtifact =
2085:           latestResult.artifact && typeof latestResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.artifact)
2086:             ? (latestResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
2087:             : {};
2088:         const latestProvenance =
2089:           latestResult.provenance && typeof latestResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.provenance)
2090:             ? (latestResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2091:             : {};
2092:         const successResult = {
2093:           ...latestResult,
2094:           url: deployedUrl,
2095:           artifact: {
2096:             sourceBundleKey: latest.sourceBundleKey,
2097:             sourceSnapshotSha256: latest.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2098:             outputBundleSha256: typeof latestArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? latestArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
2099:             outputDir: typeof latestArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? latestArtifact.outputDir : null,
2100:           },
2101:           provenance: {
2102:             ...latestProvenance,
2103:             workspaceId,
2104:             taskId:
2105:               typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string' ? requestProvenance.taskId : (latestProvenance.taskId ?? null),
2106:             operationId:
2107:               typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
2108:                 ? requestProvenance.operationId
2109:                 : (latestProvenance.operationId ?? null),
2110:             trigger:
2111:               typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
2112:                 ? requestProvenance.trigger
2113:                 : typeof latestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
2114:                   ? latestProvenance.trigger
2115:                   : 'manual',
2116:           },
2117:           rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
2118:           reconciled: true,
2119:           fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
2120:         };
2121:         const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
2122:           .prepare(
2123:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2124:              SET status = 'succeeded',
2125:                  deployed_url = ?,
2126:                  provider_deployment_id = ?,
2127:                  source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2128:                  source_bundle_key = ?,
2129:                  cancel_requested_at = NULL,
2130:                  result_json = ?,
2131:                  error_code = NULL,
2132:                  error_message = NULL,
2133:                  finished_at = ?,
2134:                  updated_at = ?
2135:              WHERE id = ?
2136:                AND workspace_id = ?
2137:                AND status = 'running'
2138:                AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
2139:           )
2140:           .bind(
2141:             deployedUrl,
2142:             latest.providerDeploymentId,
2143:             latest.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2144:             latest.sourceBundleKey,
2145:             JSON.stringify(successResult),
2146:             finishedAt,
2147:             finishedAt,
2148:             deploymentId,
2149:             workspaceId
2150:           )
2151:           .run();
2152: 
2153:         if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2154:           return false;
2155:         }
2156:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2157:           workspaceId,
2158:           deploymentId,
2159:           eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
2160:           payload: {
2161:             deployedUrl,
2162:             reconciled: true,
2163:             fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
2164:           },
2165:         });
2166:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2167:           deploymentId,
2168:           status: 'succeeded',
2169:           deployedUrl,
2170:           deployedAt: finishedAt,
2171:           errorCode: null,
2172:           errorMessage: null,
2173:         });
2174:         return true;
2175:       }
2176: 
2177:       if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
2178:         const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
2179:         const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
2180:         const failedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2181:         const failedUpdate = await env.DB
2182:           .prepare(
2183:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2184:              SET status = 'failed',
2185:                  error_code = ?,
2186:                  error_message = ?,
2187:                  finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2188:                  updated_at = ?
2189:              WHERE id = ?
2190:                AND workspace_id = ?
2191:                AND status = 'running'
2192:                AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
2193:           )
2194:           .bind(errorCode, errorMessage, failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2195:           .run();
2196: 
2197:         if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2198:           return false;
2199:         }
2200:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2201:           workspaceId,
2202:           deploymentId,
2203:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
2204:           payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
2205:         });
2206:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2207:           deploymentId,
2208:           status: 'failed',
2209:           errorCode,
2210:           errorMessage,
2211:         });
2212:         return true;
2213:       }
2214:     } catch {
2215:       // Best-effort inline reconciliation only.
2216:     }
2217: 
2218:     return false;
2219:   }
2220: 
2221:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2222:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2223:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
2224:       return false;
2225:     }
2226: 
2227:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2228:       return false;
2229:     }
2230: 
2231:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
2232:       return false;
2233:     }
2234: 
2235:     const retryUpdate = await env.DB
2236:       .prepare(
2237:         `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2238:          SET status = 'queued',
2239:              started_at = NULL,
2240:              finished_at = NULL,
2241:              error_code = 'retry_scheduled',
2242:              error_message = ?,
2243:              updated_at = ?
2244:          WHERE id = ?
2245:            AND workspace_id = ?
2246:            AND status = 'running'
2247:            AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2248:       )
2249:       .bind(
2250:         'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
2251:         new Date().toISOString(),
2252:         deploymentId,
2253:         workspaceId
2254:       )
2255:       .run();
2256: 
2257:     if ((retryUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2258:       return false;
2259:     }
2260: 
2261:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2262:       workspaceId,
2263:       deploymentId,
2264:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
2265:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
2266:     });
2267:     return true;
2268:   }
2269: 
2270:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
2271:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
2272:     try {
2273:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2274:     } catch (error) {
2275:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
2276:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {
2277:           await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
2278:           continue;
2279:         }
2280: 
2281:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
2282:         if (!reconciled) {
2283:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2284:             workspaceId,
2285:             deploymentId,
2286:             eventType: 'deployment_cancel_reconcile_deferred',
2287:             payload: {
2288:               inlineCancelReconcileDeferred: true,
2289:             },
2290:           });
2291:         }
2292:         return;
2293:       }
2294: 
2295:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
2296:         return;
2297:       }
2298: 
2299:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
2300:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
2301:         try {
2302:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
2303:           if (recovered) {
2304:             continue;
2305:           }
2306:         } catch {
2307:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
2308:         }
2309:       }
2310:     }
2311: 
2312:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2313:     if (!latest) {
2314:       return;
2315:     }
2316:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
2317:       return;
2318:     }
2319:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
2320:       continue;
2321:     }
2322:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
2323:       return;
2324:     }
2325:   }
2326: }
2327: 
2328: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
2329:   env: Env,
2330:   workspaceId: string,
2331:   deploymentId: string
2332: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
2333:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2334:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
2335:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2336:       workspaceId,
2337:       deploymentId,
2338:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
2339:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
2340:     });
2341:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2342:       deploymentId,
2343:       status: 'cancelled',
2344:       errorCode: null,
2345:       errorMessage: null,
2346:     });
2347:   }
2348:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
2349:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2350:       workspaceId,
2351:       deploymentId,
2352:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
2353:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
2354:     });
2355:   }
2356:   return result;
2357: }
2358: 
2359: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
2360:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
2361:     return true;
2362:   }
2363:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
2364:     return true;
2365:   }
2366: 
2367:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2368:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
2369: }

2261: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(
2262:   db: D1Database,
2263:   workspaceId: string,

2265: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {

2270:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2271:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2272:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2273:            error_code = NULL,
2274:            error_message = NULL,
2275:            updated_at = ?
2276:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2277:     )
2278:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2279:     .run();
2280: 
2281:   const runningResult = await db
2282:     .prepare(
2283:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2284:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2285:            updated_at = ?
2286:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2287:     )
2288:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2289:     .run();
2290: 
2291:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2292: 
2293:   return {
2294:     deployment,
2295:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2296:   };
2297: }
2298: 
2299: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2300:   db: D1Database,
2301:   input: {
2302:     workspaceId: string;
2303:     deploymentId: string;
2304:     eventType: string;
2305:     payload: unknown;
2306:   }
2307: ): Promise<number> {
2308:   const seqResult = await db
2309:     .prepare(
2310:       'UPDATE workspace_deployments SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq'
2311:     )
2312:     .bind(input.deploymentId, input.workspaceId)
2313:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2314: 
2315:   if (!seqResult) {
2316:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace deployment ${input.deploymentId}`);
2317:   }
2318: 
2319:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);

(Showing lines 2200-2319 of 2575. Use offset=2320 to continue.)
</content>

metadata.description: Shows changes in workspace deployment runner

parts.text:
Found 2 blocker-level terminal-state clobber races still present.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1576`  
  stale-running recovery calls `updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(..., 'failed', ...)`, but that helper updates by `id`/`workspace_id` only (`packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:2206`) with no expected-state guard.  
  Race: another worker can transition the row to terminal (`succeeded`/`cancelled`/`failed`) between the read of `existing` and this write, and this path will still overwrite it to `failed`.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1779`  
  the `workspaceDeployEnabled === false` path uses the same unguarded helper write to set `failed`.  
  Same issue: if another concurrent actor already finalized the deployment, this unconditional write can clobber terminal state.

`markDeploymentCancelled` itself looks properly CAS-hardened now (`status IN ('queued','running')` + `changes===0` short-circuit), and the two catch-path direct SQL failed writes are also CAS-guarded.
